title: Particle cannon turret
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Cannon_go_boom.jpg|right|thumb|A particle cannon turret]]
The '''particle cannon turret''' was a type of turret-mounted [[particle beam cannon]] used by many governments and organizations. It was a heavy ground weapon with a great amount of firepower and a fair amount of splash damage.

==History==
====The Clone Wars====
It was used at the [[Battle of Mygeeto]]. The [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] destroyed two of them to clear a path for [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]]. They were also used during the [[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)/Legends|Battle of Felucia]] as the Separatists' primary defenses, until they were destroyed by [[Clone heavy assault trooper|clone heavy troopers]], and an [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE]]. They were also used on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] by the Republic and [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]. The Particle cannon turret was also on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the [[Battle of Naboo (Imperial Period)|Imperial invasion]]. Particle cannon turrets were also found on many capital ships, including [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]], [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyers]], [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyers]], [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari cruisers]] and [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|''Providence''-class carrier/destroyers]] and ground units such as [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]], [[T4-B heavy tank]], [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|AATs]] and many more.

====Galactic Civil War====
In the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], while defending the [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] crew, [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]] was commanded to build a particle cannon turret to destroy an AT-AT while using the [[Power generator/Legends|power generator]] of a crashed [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/carrier/Legends|LAAT/i]] as a power source.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2005-11-01 -->[[Star Wars Battlefront II: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Battlefront II'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
